paper.title_en: Bias from small-scale leakage in Pulsar Timing Array maps
paper.abstract_en: Pulsar Timing Array experiments are rapidly approaching the era of gravitational wave background anisotropy detection. The timing residuals of each pulsar are an integrated measure of the gravitational-wave power across all angular scales. However, due to the limited number of monitored pulsars, current analyses are only able to reconstruct the angular structure of the background at large scales. We show analytically that this mismatch between the integrated all-sky signal and the truncated reconstruction introduces a previously unaccounted source of systematic bias in the anisotropic background angular power spectrum. The source of this systematic error, that we call ``small-scale leakage'', is the intrinsic presence of unaccounted gravitational wave power at scales smaller than the reconstructed scales. This unmodeled power leaks into large-scale modes, artificially increasing the recovered value of the inferred angular power spectrum by at least one order of magnitude in a wide range of scales. Importantly, this effect is fundamentally independent of the geometry of the pulsar configuration, the anisotropy reconstruction method, the use of different regularization schemes, and the presence of pulsar noise. As the quality of pulsar timing array experiments improves, a robust understanding of small-scale leakage will become paramount for reliable detection and characterization of the gravitational wave background. Thus, the theoretical formalism developed here will be essential to estimate the magnitude of this systematic uncertainty in anisotropy searches.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该文揭示了脉冲星计时阵列各向异性重建中一个重要的系统偏差来源（小尺度泄漏），理论分析清晰，对引力波背景探测有重要意义。
decision.title_zh: 脉冲星计时阵列地图中小尺度泄漏导致的偏差
decision.abstract_zh: 脉冲星计时阵列实验正迅速接近引力波背景各向异性探测的时代。每颗脉冲星的计时残差是跨所有角尺度引力波功率的积分度量。然而，由于受监测的脉冲星数量有限，当前的分析只能重建背景在大尺度上的角结构。我们解析地表明，这种积分全天空信号与截断重建之间的不匹配引入了各向异性背景角功率谱中一个先前未考虑的系统偏差来源。这种系统误差的来源，我们称之为“小尺度泄漏”，是在比重建尺度更小的尺度上未考虑的引力波功率的内在存在。这种未建模的功率泄漏到大尺度模式中，人为地将推断的角功率谱的恢复值在广泛的尺度范围内增加了至少一个数量级。重要的是，这种效应从根本上独立于脉冲星配置的几何形状、各向异性重建方法、不同正则化方案的使用以及脉冲星噪声的存在。随着脉冲星计时阵列实验质量的提高，对小尺度泄漏的稳健理解对于可靠探测和表征引力波背景将变得至关重要。因此，这里发展的理论形式对于估计各向异性搜索中这一系统不确定性的幅度将是必需的。
